parentQuestion: A patient receives an IV infusion of distilled water by mistake. Red blood cells...

scaffolds.q: A solution with LOWER solute concentration than the cell interior is called ___.
scaffolds.explain: Hypotonic means 'low solute' relative to the cell — more water, less stuff dissolved in it. Water will move INTO the cell from the hypotonic solution. Hypo = low. Don't lose this thread:, darling.

scaffolds.q: When a red blood cell bursts due to excess water intake, this is called ___.
scaffolds.explain: Hemolysis is the rupture of red blood cells with release of hemoglobin. Hemo = blood, lysis = breaking apart. When osmosis drives too much water into RBCs, they swell and burst. Physics is brutal, darling.
